summary: Tested refactored RegistroForm.jsx components after splitting from 3354 lines to 789 lines orchestrator + 7 subcomponents. All components render correctly and maintain full functionality. Fixed backend bug (ESTADOS_PRODUCCION not defined in stats_reportes.py) that was blocking page loads.

minor.issue: ESTADOS_PRODUCCION was not imported in stats_reportes.py - FIXED by adding import from models.py

features_verified: Navigate to Registros page - shows list of 32 registros
RegistroHeader component: shows Corte number, modelo name, estado selector, ruta visual breadcrumbs, guardar rapido button
RegistroDatosCard component: N° Corte field, Modelo selector, Artículo PT selector, Línea de Negocio badge, Marcar como Urgente checkbox
RegistroTallasCard component: talla selector, talla table with quantities, Agregar Colores button (when tallas selected)
RegistroMovimientosCard component: movimientos table, Agregar Movimiento button (disabled when paralizado)
RegistroPanelLateral component: Lote summary, Estado badge, Prendas count, Modelo details, Conversación button
RegistroIncidenciasCard component: shows incidencias with estados, resolver/eliminar buttons
MovimientoDialog: opens correctly with servicio/persona selectors, fecha fields, cantidad fields, tarifa field
NEW registro form (/registros/nuevo): shows create mode with empty fields, no estado banner
PARALIZADO registro (Corte 09): shows red PARALIZADO banner, disabled movimiento editing, incidencia with Paraliza badge
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successfully reduced RegistroForm.jsx from 3354 to 789 lines
All 7 subcomponents properly exported via index.js barrel file
State management correctly remains in parent RegistroForm.jsx
All data-testid attributes preserved for testing
Props passed correctly to all subcomponents
context_for_next_testing_agent: RegistroForm refactoring is complete and working. All 7 subcomponents (RegistroHeader, RegistroDatosCard, RegistroTallasCard, RegistroMovimientosCard, RegistroIncidenciasCard, RegistroPanelLateral, RegistroDialogs) render correctly. The backend had a missing import for ESTADOS_PRODUCCION which was fixed. Test registros: 205 (Normal), 09 (Paralizado with incidencia).

components_tested.RegistroHeader: PASS - shows corte, modelo, estado selector, ruta breadcrumbs, guardar button
components_tested.RegistroDatosCard: PASS - all form fields render correctly
components_tested.RegistroTallasCard: PASS - talla selector and table work
components_tested.RegistroMovimientosCard: PASS - movimientos table and add button work
components_tested.RegistroIncidenciasCard: PASS - incidencias display with resolver/eliminar buttons
components_tested.RegistroPanelLateral: PASS - summary panel with all stats
